rows.label: qev035101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ohh! Even though you're an Earthling,
you look pretty strong... Could you
endure his training with that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Say, I'm looking for a strong one.
Are you stronger than any beast?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0010
rows.name: Strong

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer confidently that you are strong.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0020
rows.name: Weak

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0021
rows.name: Shake your head unreliably.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Just as I thought! I could
tell at a glance that you're
a warrior with sharp fangs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see... Then I have no business
with you. Only a true strong
one is fit for this job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0005
rows.name:
His strength is not ordinary... A
coward who calls themselves weak might
end up losing their life, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0006
rows.name:
You should be fit to be Odsent's
opponent! Say, would you do combat
training against the Zuse I tamed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for more details about Odsent.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask what it means to
tame a native creature.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0007
rows.name:
First, you must know your enemy... is
it? As expected of a top-tier warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0008
rows.name:
In order to tame a ferocious Zuse that had
come to this area, I've been attempting
to train it ever since coming to Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Taming it was no simple task...
but recently, I finally succeeded
in making it my servant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0010
rows.name:
That strongest servant's name is
Odsent! He's the ultimate beast
who will make my dream come true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I want you to conduct combat training in a
real-battle format in order to enhance the
combat abilities of my strongest servant, Odsent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Hm? Have you never fought
against a Bias who tamed beasts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hehe, then you were lucky! The Tree Clan
excels at taming beasts as our own
weapons and beating down our enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Beasts tamed by the Bias are strengthened
through daily training, and their combat
abilities are dramatically raised, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you were to end up fighting one, even
a warrior like you wouldn't win easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hmm... So, you see. The one I
want you to fight this time,
Odsent, is also my servant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0017
rows.name:
I want you to train him in a
real-battle format and draw out the
hidden combat abilities within him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0018
rows.name:
In order to make my dream come true, I
need to make Odsent stronger and stronger!
Say... Won't you do it for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Oh! That's a huge help! Then, a place
that's easy to fight in... Right. I'll
send Odsent to the cape of Janpath Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0020
rows.name:
I want you to show Odsent
your true power there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0021
rows.name:
If possible, I want him to experience combat right
on the edge of life and death, so feel free to fight
as you normally would without holding back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Also, I don't think it'll happen,
but if he ends up running away,
let me know immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0023
rows.name:
...I'm counting on you, then.
With your power, make Odsent
into a fully-fledged servant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Now that it's decided, I'll immediately
send Odsent to the cape of Janpath
Lake in the Primordial Wilderness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Hehe! He's no ordinary beast.
If you let your guard down,
you'll die, so be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ohh! You came back alive! How was it?
My Odsent was strong, wasn't he?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0051
rows.name: Honestly express that he was strong.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0060
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0061
rows.name: Confidently say it wasn't a big deal.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Isn't that right, isn't that right! Since
coming to Mira, he's the beast I carefully
selected and made into my servant, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Wait! What did you say!? But Odsent
ran away towards the mountains!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0029
rows.name:
I suppose he still lacked the training
to face a strong opponent like you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0030
rows.name:
But someday, I'll train him more and he'll gain
strength that even surpasses yours! What kind
of opponent should I prepare for him next...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Wait! What did you say!? Odsent
just ran away towards the mountains!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0032
rows.name:
...No way... Even though I ordered him to
absolutely not run away and fight... Does
this mean my training wasn't perfect...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Guh... This has turned
into a bad situation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0034
rows.name:
...I'm sorry... I have
a favor to ask you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0035
rows.name:
At this rate, the suggestion
placed on Odsent might break,
and he might return to the wild.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0036
rows.name:
If that happens, he might randomly
attack BLADEs or aliens who went
to the northern mountains...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Please... Could you quickly fetch some
White Iron Sand and a Noranlily for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'll use those to make him my
servant once again. This time, I
absolutely won't let him get away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0039
rows.name:
We Bias use incense to
make beasts obey us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0040
rows.name:
With White Iron Sand and a
Noranlily, I can make a powerful
one. Please... get them quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Guh... Hey, did you get the things I
asked for? Every second counts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0042
rows.name:
Ohh! That's exactly it! With this, I
can make a powerful training incense![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0043
rows.name:
Alright... Then next, I
have to find Odsent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0074
rows.name:
If he's gone wild, he must definitely
be in some cave somewhere...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Sorry to drag you into this, but could you
also search the caves near the northern mountains?
I can't possibly check them all by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0045
rows.name:
It's for the dream I've held since
I was young... Please! Help me!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0070
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask what Zarch's dream is.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0080
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0081
rows.name: Promise to help.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'll tell you once we catch Odsent. It's
something that can't be realized without him.
There's no point in talking about it now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0047
rows.name:
The only thing I can say is that the
name Odsent means "to carve open the
future" in the old Bias language.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0048
rows.name:
He's absolutely necessary for
me to move forward! Please,
find him no matter what![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0049
rows.name: Thank you... I'm truly glad I met you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0050
rows.name:
Odsent... The strongest servant bearing
a name meaning "to carve open the
future" in the old Bias language...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0051
rows.name:
Please, find him without fail! He's
absolutely necessary for me to
realize my dream and move forward![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0052
rows.name:
Dammit! What is the meaning of this!
To think my dream would be hindered
by the chieftain I respect...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0090
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask what happened to Zarch.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0100
rows.name: Relief

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0101
rows.name:
Express joy that unnecessary
revenge has not yet taken place.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0053
rows.name:
It's you... Will you
listen to me, my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0054
rows.name:
Truth is, our chieftain, Sevvy Belgazus, told us
that while we are in NLA, any unnecessary attacks
on the Cavern Clan are strictly forbidden...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0055
rows.name:
Guh... Every last one of them
is a pacifist! What happened to
the pride of the Tree Clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0056
rows.name:
Our chieftain, Sevvy Belgazus, seems to
share the same thoughts as you and has no
intention of fighting the Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0057
rows.name:
...To think we must overlook the
bastards who oppressed us, even
while possessing such power...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0058
rows.name:
At this rate, I feel so sorry for my
mother who was killed by the Cavern
Clan when we became their prisoners...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0059
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0060
rows.name:
No... I'm sorry. First, I must
thank you... We Bias always return
both grudges and debts in full.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0061
rows.name:
Thanks to you, Odsent remains. But...
the chieftain's orders are absolute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0062
rows.name:
...If we ever leave this NLA someday,
I'll massacre them all at that time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0063
rows.name: I see... So you defeated Odsent...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0064
rows.name:
Hmph... Do as you please. My dream has
already shattered! By your hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0065
rows.name:
There's no meaning in living like this anymore!
If you want to kill me, then kill me! Just like
those Cavern bastards killed my mother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0111
rows.name: Overflow with bloodlust.

rows.label: qev035101_JNK0120
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035101_SEL0121
rows.name:
Explain that you aren't taking
the side of the Cavern Clan.

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0066
rows.name: ...Are you really going to do it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0067
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0068
rows.name:
No... Actually, wait... I
still don't want to die yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0069
rows.name:
I'll give you this, so... forgive me. No
matter how miserable it is, if I don't
keep living, my dream won't come true...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0070
rows.name:
Hmph... Such pretty words
won't reach my ears...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0071
rows.name:
...However, I will thank
you for finding Odsent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0072
rows.name:
We return grudges in full, but we also
return debts properly. Take this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035101_MSG0073
rows.name:
Disappear to somewhere else.
And at the very least... don't
get in my way anymore.[ST:wait ]
